tipRules.tip: Wheeler: When fishing offshore ledges with a deep-diving crankbait like a DT20, focus on angles and reading the mood of the fish to trigger reactions from bigger bass, even when everyone else is finesse fishing.

knowledge.insight: Wheeler: Casting angles are critical for deep cranking offshore structure - varying your angle of retrieve relative to the cover triggers reaction strikes from bigger fish.
Wheeler: Reading the mood of offshore bass is essential - sometimes a deep crankbait triggers reaction bites from bigger fish when finesse approaches are dominating.
